title: Never Seek To Tell Thy Love
content:
Never seek to tell thy love
    Love that never told can be;
    For the gentle wind does move
    Silently, invisibly.

    I told my love, I told my love,
    I told her all my heart,
    Trembling, cold, in ghastly fears
    Ah, she doth depart.

    Soon as she was gone from me
    A traveller came by
    Silently, invisibly
    O, was no deny.
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Blake, titled "Never Seek To Tell Thy Love", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
